title: Bureau live operational register
goal: Separate live thread/repo focus and candidate observations from durable Git registry truth so multiple ecosystem threads can coordinate without Queue PRs for every focus movement.
completion: Operators can record thread focus, candidate work and focus overrides in Bureau state without mutating registry/queue.json.
what-now and repo-balls can optionally surface live focus without treating it as queue or claim truth.
Candidate work can be promoted to durable Registry PRs through a reviewed path.
Retention/export boundaries preserve evidence without turning Live Register into an unbounded knowledge base.

metadata.source_request: User wants Bureau as the node where information relevant for tasks and execution converges while supporting multiple simultaneous threads.
metadata.design_decision: Keep Git for durable truth; add state-store/eventlog for live operational registration.
metadata.completion_ready_reason: All registered Live Register follow-up tasks T002-T006 are verified in the complete v1 implementation slice.
